landing.title: RealtorBoss — Your AI Real Estate Team. Close More Deals.
landing.description: RealtorBoss is an AI-powered real estate team that answers every call, follows up with every lead, and coordinates every transaction — so you close more deals without hiring additional staff. Pro from $49/mo.

og.title: RealtorBoss — Hire an AI Real Estate Team. Close More Deals.
og.description: Your AI Real Estate Team — from first call to closing. AI Receptionist, Sales Assistant, and Transaction Assistant under your direction. 14-day trial, cancel anytime.

about.title: About RealtorBoss — Your AI Real Estate Team
about.description: RealtorBoss (formerly LeadSmart AI) gives real estate agents an AI team — a Receptionist, Sales Assistant, and Transaction Assistant — that answers every call, follows up with every lead, and coordinates every transaction.

og.description: Your AI Real Estate Team — answer every call, follow up with every lead, coordinate every transaction, and close more deals.

pricing.title: Pricing | RealtorBoss
pricing.description: Free, Pro ($49), Elite ($99), and Team ($199) plans — full feature comparison for your AI real estate team: receptionist, follow-ups, and transaction coordination.
